neem oil reduced inflammation somewhat but supportively. HSP, an antioxidant and

riers improved HSP delivery and effectiveness [27,56]. When coupled with neem oil

owing to its synergistic anti-inflammatory properties. This thorough re-view demonstrates
that advanced formulations such as GO-HSP neem oil double emulsion can effectively cure
otitis media. These findings imply that enhanced nanocarrier systems can provide greater
therapeutic efficacy than traditional drug formulations, paving the path for more effective
treatment options in inflammatory disorders like otitis media [15,24].
